nredisstack_sync.signature: StreamClaim(RedisKey key, RedisValue consumerGroup, RedisValue claimingConsumer, long minIdleTimeInMs, RedisValue[] messageIds, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: key
params.description: The key of the stream.

params.name: consumerGroup
params.description: The consumer group.

params.name: claimingConsumer
params.description: The consumer claiming the given message(s).

params.name: minIdleTimeInMs
params.description: The minimum message idle time to allow the reassignment of the message(s).

params.name: messageIds
params.description: The IDs of the messages to claim for the given consumer.

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The messages successfully claimed by the given consumer.

php.signature: xclaim(string $key, string $group, string $consumer, int $minIdleTime, string|array $ids, ?int $idle = null, ?int $time = null, ?int $retryCount = null, bool $force = false, bool $justId = false, ?string $lastId = null)

params.name: key
params.description: the stream key

params.name: group
params.description: the consumer group name

params.name: consumer
params.description: the consumer name

params.name: min_idle_time
params.description: the number of milliseconds

params.name: *ids
params.description: one or multiple entry ids

params.name: idle
params.description: the number of milliseconds as last time it was delivered

params.name: time
params.description: the number of milliseconds as a specific Unix Epoch time

params.name: retrycount
params.description: the number of retry counter

params.name: force
params.description: whether to create the pending entry

params.name: justid
params.description: whether to fetch just an array of entry ids
